wheelEmpty: Add at least two options to get started.
wheelHint: Tap the wheel or use the button.
optionsHint: Type an option and add it. You can rename it, recolor it, or remove it whenever you want.
removeWinner: Remove the winning option after each spin
cleanupHint: If 20 minutes pass without activity, the options are cleared automatically.
statusShuffled: The order of the options has changed.
statusExpired: The options were cleared due to inactivity.
